title: Silly Critters
description: Silly critters are been appaering around the overworld having each one something caracteristic and there will be more creatures to be discovered
body:
Silly critters are been appaering around the overworld having each one something caracteristic and there will be more creatures to be discovered
Some creatures being real animals or just fantastic animals to improved minecraft atmosphere
(The mod is still in development REQUIRES Geckolib to function)
 

THE GIANT DODO

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This giant bird recently extint on minecrarft world , lived around warm biomes where evolved and begging bigger than his original cousin, now the giant dodos dissapear but  there is a possibility that some egg survided without hatching since then...
 ![dodos family](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad3d9eb040031f23fdffae5e4ed627f0fe95e7e6.png)

</details>



SEA DOGS


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

A peculiar fish that by the pass of the time it get a convergent evolution with minecraft wolves, being a greater group of predators, having variations on it's scales being the most rare the golden one.

 ![sea dog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6571a6c11b521bb467600f917736cc67cda8391f_0.webp)

</details>


DONUTISH

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


This weird fish were bring by the adaptation of minecraft oceans, having more advantages have a cubic form, besides this it developed a strange but sweet meat, being the favorite of some little predators


</details>


WALKING JELLYFISH

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This jellyfish where the result of years of evolution of a weird jellyfish who get a way to the land , developing more strengh tentacles , having various colorations (also having nametag skins)
![jellyfish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7373bda35536bd59f80203eb395a964f109ceca1_0.webp)


</details>

MOD GUIDE :

The mod guide can be crafted with a dodo feather, hyraceum, and a book.
Those items can be found in structures around the world.
some info about the mod while i finish the mod guide :


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-giant dodo: has to be hatched(it's a completely different block) with flame petals and needs potassium to grow, they like green tea( but have to be put to sleep to be tamed), can jump.
-Hyrax: If you give a freeze treat, them will dig treasures for you(like big potatoes and other items)
-Walking jellyfish: a sweet living jelly that you can get its jelly from a jar and make delicious recipes.
-donutish: a new source of food can be bucket.
-odd larva: just a larva that likes human flesh and fears of flying bugs, when dead, can be used for parasitation potion.
-sea dog: a sea hunter who likes donuts and can give you their scales to make a custom armor(can be tamed if you have a seadog helmet).
-walkitato: a living potato that can be tamed with bone meal for battling purposes, can be equipped with an underwear(can be tamed with bone meal).
-biped salamander: you can find their nest and hatch their eggs, and then tame them with fried oddnanas or knock out the big ones and give them an oddnana jar, which can be used as a turret.
-fluffy firefly: can be tamed with raw larvas, and can create shiny dust when hunting odd larvas, also been able to create custom armor. 

a new entire biome named Odd Island with giant flora and new flowers there
 
</details>
